protein_name: Required for the activation of AURKA at the onset of mitosis. Belongs to the BORA family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Biological Process: cell division; regulation of mitotic nuclear division; regulation of mitotic spindle organization; regulation of protein localization
raw_fields.Alt. Names/Synonyms: aurora borealis; BORA; BORA aurora kinase A activator; C13orf34; chromosome 13 open reading frame 34; FLJ22624; HsBora; Protein aurora borealis
raw_fields.Basal Isoelectric point: 4.8 Predict pI for various phosphorylation states
